verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ኢትፍራህ ፡ ወኢትደንግፅ ፡ ንሥኦሙ ፡ ምስሌከ ፡ ለኵሎሙ ፡ ዕደው ፡ መስተቃትላን ፡
                  ወተንሥእ ፡ ወዕረግ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጋይ ፡ እስመ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አግባእክዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እደዊከ ፡ ለንጉሠ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ወለሕዝቡሂ ፡
                  ወለሀገሩሂ ፡ ወለምድሩሂ ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Joshua, Fear not, nor be timorous: take with thee all the men of war, and arise, go up to Gai; behold, I have given into thy hands the king of Gai, and his land.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Joshua, Fear not, neither be thou dismayed: take all the people of war with thee, and arise, go up to Ai: see, I have given into thy hand the king of Ai, and his people, and his city, and his land:

verses.geez:
ወትገብሮሙ ፡ ለጋይ ፡ ወለንጉሦሙ ፡ ከመ ፡ ገበርካሃ ፡ ለኢያሪኮ ፡ ወንጉሣ ፡ ወበርበረ ፡ እንስሳሆሙ ፡ በርብር ፡
                  ለርእስከ ፡ ወባሕቱ ፡ ፈኑ ፡ ይዕግትዋ ፡ ለሀገር ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ከዋላሃ ።

translations.lxx: And thou shalt do to Gai, as thou didst to Jericho and its king; and thou shalt take to thyself the spoil of its cattle; set now for thyself an ambush for the city behind.
translations.kjv: And thou shalt do to Ai and her king as thou didst unto Jericho and her king: only the spoil thereof, and the cattle thereof, shall ye take for a prey unto yourselves: lay thee an ambush for the city behind it.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥአ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘመስተቃትላን ፡ ወዐርጉ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ወኀርየ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ሠለስተ ፡
                  እልፈ ፡ ዕደወ ፡ ጽኑዓነ ፡ ወመስተቃትላነ ፡ ወኀያላነ ፡ ወፈነዎሙ ፡ በሌሊት ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua and all the men of war rose to go up to Gai; and Joshua chose out thirty thousand mighty men, and he sent them away by night.
translations.kjv: So Joshua arose, and all the people of war, to go up against Ai: and Joshua chose out thirty thousand mighty men of valour, and sent them away by night.

verses.geez:
ወአዘዞሙ ፡ ወይቤሎሙ ፡ ሑሩ ፡ ከመ ፡ ታእምሩ ፡ ዕግትዋ ፡ ለሀገር ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ከዋላሃ ፡ ለሀገር ፡
                  ወኢትርሐቁ ፡ በሕቁ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወንበሩ ፡ ኵልክሙ ፡ ድልዋኒክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And he charged them, saying, Do ye lie in ambush behind the city: do not go far from the city, and ye shall all be ready.
translations.kjv: And he commanded them, saying, Behold, ye shall lie in wait against the city, even behind the city: go not very far from the city, but be ye all ready:

verses.geez:
ወአንሰ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እለ ፡ ምስሌየ ፡ ነሐውር ፡ ኀበ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ወፅኡ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ወተቀበሉነ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ቀዲሙ ፡ ንጐይይ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ።

translations.lxx: And I and all with me will draw near to the city: and it shall come to pass when the inhabitants of Gai shall come forth to meet us, as before, that we will flee from before them.
translations.kjv: And I, and all the people that are with me, will approach unto the city: and it shall come to pass, when they come out against us, as at the first, that we will flee before them,

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ወፅኡ ፡ ወዴገኑነ ፡ ናርሕቆሙ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወይብሉ ፡ ነትዑ ፡ እሉሂ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጽነ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ቀዲሙ ፡ ወንሕነሰ ፡ ንጐይይ ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ።

translations.lxx: And when they shall come out after us, we will draw them away from the city; and they will say, These men flee from before us, as also before.
translations.kjv: (For they will come out after us) till we have drawn them from the city; for they will say, They flee before us, as at the first: therefore we will flee before them.

verses.geez:
ወእምዝ ፡ እንከ ፡ ተንሥኡ ፡ አንትሙሂ ፡ ወአጥፍእዋ ፡ ለሀገሮሙ ፡ ወያገብኣ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላክክሙ ፡ ውስተ ፡
                  እደዊክሙ ።

translations.lxx: And ye shall rise up out of the ambuscade, and go into the city.
translations.kjv: Then ye shall rise up from the ambush, and seize upon the city: for the LORD your God will deliver it into your hand.

verses.geez: ወእምከመ ፡ ቦእክምዋ ፡ ለሀገሮሙ ፡ አውዕይዋ ፡ በእሳት ፡ ወግበሩ ፡ በከመ ፡ እቤለክሙ ፡ ናሁ ፡ አዘዝኩክሙ ።

translations.lxx: Ye shall do according to this word, lo! I have commanded you.
translations.kjv: And it shall be, when ye have taken the city, that ye shall set the city on fire: according to the commandment of the LORD shall ye do. See, I have commanded you.

verses.geez:
ወፈነዎሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወሖሩ ፡ ይዕግቱ ፡ ወነበሩ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ቤቴል ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ጋይ ፡ እምኀበ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ ጋይ ፡
                  ወቤተ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ህየ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ሌሊት ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ሕዝብ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua sent them, and they went to lie in ambush; and they lay between Bæthel and Gai, westward of Gai.
translations.kjv: Joshua therefore sent them forth: and they went to lie in ambush, and abode between Bethel and Ai, on the west side of Ai: but Joshua lodged that night among the people.

verses.geez:
ወጌሠ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ በጽባሕ ፡ ወርእዮሙ ፡ ለሕዝብ ፡ ወዐርጉ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወሊቃናቲሆሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ፍጽመ ፡ ቅድመ ፡
                  ሕዝብ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ጋይ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua rose up early in the morning, and numbered the people; and he went up, he and the elders before the people to Gai.
translations.kjv: And Joshua rose up early in the morning, and numbered the people, and went up, he and the elders of Israel, before the people to Ai.

verses.geez:
ወዐርጉ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ መስተቃትላን ፡ ምስሌሁ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ሖሩ ፡ ወበጽሑ ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ሀገር ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡
                  ጽባሒሃ ። ወእለሂ ፡ ዐገትዋ ፡ ለሀገር ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ጽባሐ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ወተአኀዝዋ ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ መስዕ ፡
                  ለጋይ ፡ ወፂኦት ፡ ማእከሎሙ ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ጋይ ።

translations.lxx: And all the men of war went up with him, and they went forward and came over against the city eastward.
translations.kjv: And all the people, even the people of war that were with him, went up, and drew nigh, and came before the city, and pitched on the north side of Ai: now there was a valley between them and Ai.

verses.geez:
ወነሥአ ፡ ኀምሳ ፡ ምእተ ፡ ብእሴ ፡ ወአንበሮሙ ፡ ይዕግቱ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ቤትውን ፡ ወማእከለ ፡ ጋይ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ባሕረ
                  ፡ ጋይ ።

translations.lxx: And the ambuscade was on the west side of the city.
translations.kjv: And he took about five thousand men, and set them to lie in ambush between Bethel and Ai, on the west side of the city.

verses.geez:
ወአኅደሩ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ተዓይኒሆሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ መስዕ ፡ ዘሀገር ፡ ወጽንፉ ፡ እስከ ፡ ባሕረ ፡ ሀገር ፡
                  ወሖረ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ በይእቲ ፡ ሌሊት ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ፂኦት ።

translations.kjv: And when they had set the people, even all the host that was on the north of the city, and their liers in wait on the west of the city, Joshua went that night into the midst of the valley.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ሰምዐ ፡ ንጉሠ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ጌሠ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ ወወፅኡ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወተቀበልዎሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ ቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ከመ
                  ፡ ይትቃተልዎሙ ፡ ውእቱ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ ሕዝብ ፡ ዘምስሌሁ ፡ በጊዜሃ ፡ መንጸረ ፡ አራባ ፡ ወኢያእመረ ፡ ውእቱሰ ፡ ከመ ፡
                  ዐገትዎሙ ፡ እንተ ፡ መንገለ ፡ ከወላሃ ፡ ለሀገር ።

translations.lxx: And it came to pass when the king of Gai saw it, he hasted and went out to meet them direct to the battle, he and all the people that were with him: and he knew not that there was an ambuscade formed against him behind the city.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when the king of Ai saw it, that they hasted and rose up early, and the men of the city went out against Israel to battle, he and all his people, at a time appointed, before the plain; but he wist not that there were liers in ambush against him behind the city.

verses.geez: ወሶበ ፡ በጽሕዎሙ ፡ ጐዩ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ እምቅድመ ፡ ገጾሙ ፡ ወነትዑ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ፍኖተ ፡ ገዳም ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua and Israel saw, and retreated from before them.
translations.kjv: And Joshua and all Israel made as if they were beaten before them, and fled by the way of the wilderness.

verses.geez: ወኄለ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሕዝበ ፡ ብሔር ፡ ወተለውዎሙ ፡ ወሰደድዎሙ ፡ ወዴገንዎሙ ፡ እምድኅሬሆሙ ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.lxx: And they pursued after the children of Israel, and they themselves went to a distance from the city.
translations.kjv: And all the people that were in Ai were called together to pursue after them: and they pursued after Joshua, and were drawn away from the city.

verses.geez:
ወርሒቆሙ ፡ እሙንቱ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ሶበ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ዘተርፈ ፡ ወኢመኑሂ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጋይ ፡ [ወ]ውስተ ፡ ቤቴል ፡
                  ዘኢተለዎሙ ፡ ወዘኢዴገኖሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወኀደግዋ ፡ ለሀገር ፡ ርኁተ ፡ ወሰደድዎሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወደገንዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: There was no one left in Gai who did not pursue after Israel; and they left the city open, and pursued after Israel.
translations.kjv: And there was not a man left in Ai or Bethel, that went not out after Israel: and they left the city open, and pursued after Israel.

verses.geez:
ወይቤሎ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ አልዕል ፡ እዴከ ፡ በጋይሶ ፡ ዘውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ [ላዕለ ፡ ጋይ ፡] እስመ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ እዴከ ፡ አግባእክዋ ፡ ወእለሂ ፡ ዐገቱ ፡ ለይትነሥኡ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ እምነ ፡ መካናቲሆሙ ፡ ወአልዐለ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ ኢየሱስ
                  ፡ በጋይሶ ፡ ላዕለ ፡ ሀገር ።

translations.lxx: And the Lord said to Joshua, Stretch forth thy hand with the spear that is in thy hand toward the city, for I have delivered it into thy hands; and the liers in wait shall rise up quickly out of their place.
translations.kjv: And the LORD said unto Joshua, Stretch out the spear that is in thy hand toward Ai; for I will give it into thine hand. And Joshua stretched out the spear that he had in his hand toward the city.

verses.geez:
ወተንሥኡ ፡ እለሂ ፡ ዐገቱ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ እምነ ፡ መካናቲሆሙ ፡ ወወፅኡ ፡ ሶበ ፡ አልዐለ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ በጋይሶ ፡ [ወቦኡ ፡
                  ሀገረ ፡] ወረከብዋ ፡ ወአውዐይዋ ፡ ፍጡነ ፡ በእሳት ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua stretched out his hand and his spear toward the city, and the ambuscade rose up quickly out of their place; and they came forth when he stretched out his hand; and they entered into the city, and took it; and they hasted and burnt the city with fire.
translations.kjv: And the ambush arose quickly out of their place, and they ran as soon as he had stretched out his hand: and they entered into the city, and took it, and hasted and set the city on fire.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ነጸሩ ፡ ድኅሬሆሙ ፡ ሰብአ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ወርእዩ ፡ ጢሰ ፡ የዐርግ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ሀገሮሙ ፡
                  ኀጥኡ ፡ እንከ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ይጐዩ ፡ ኢለፌ ፡ ወኢለፌ ፡ ወሕዝብኒ ፡ እለ ፡ ጐዩ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ተመይጥዎሙ ፡ ለእለ ፡
                  ዴገንዎሙ ።

translations.lxx: And when the inhabitants of Gai looked round behind them, then they saw the smoke going up out of the city to heaven, and they were no longer able to flee this way or that way.
translations.kjv: And when the men of Ai looked behind them, they saw, and, behold, the smoke of the city ascended up to heaven, and they had no power to flee this way or that way: and the people that fled to the wilderness turned back upon the pursuers.

verses.geez:
ወርእየ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ከመ ፡ ረከብዋ ፡ ለሀገር ፡ እለ ፡ ዐገትዋ ፡ [ወአእመሩ ፡] ሶበ ፡ ርእዩ ፡ ጢሰ ፡ የዐርግ ፡
                  ውስተ ፡ ሰማይ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወእምዝ ፡ ተመይጡ ፡ ወቀተልዎሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ጋይ ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua and all Israel saw that the ambuscade had taken the city, and that the smoke of the city went up to heaven; and they turned and smote the men of Gai.
translations.kjv: And when Joshua and all Israel saw that the ambush had taken the city, and that the smoke of the city ascended, then they turned again, and slew the men of Ai.

verses.geez:
ወእልክቱሂ ፡ ወፅኡ ፡ እምነ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ወተቀበልዎሙ ፡ ወአግብእዎሙ ፡ ማእከለ ፡ ትዕይንቶሙ ፡ ለእስራኤል ፡ ወቀተልዎሙ
                  ፡ ወእልክቱሂ ፡ እምከሓ ፡ ወእሉሂ ፡ እምለፌ ፡ እስከ ፡ ኢያትረፉ ፡ እምኔሆሙ ፡ ነፋጺተ ፡ ዘድኅነ ።

translations.lxx: And these came forth out of the city to meet them; and they were in the midst of the army, some being on this side, and some on that; and they smote them until there was not left of them one who survived and escaped.
translations.kjv: And the other issued out of the city against them; so they were in the midst of Israel, some on this side, and some on that side: and they smote them, so that they let none of them remain or escape.

verses.geez: ወአኀዝዎ ፡ ለንጉሠ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ሕያዎ ፡ ወወሰድዎ ፡ ኀበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ።

translations.lxx: And they took the king of Gai alive, and brought him to Joshua.
translations.kjv: And the king of Ai they took alive, and brought him to Joshua.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ አኅለቁ ፡ ቀቲሎቶሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በገዳም ፡ ወበሙራደ ፡ ደብር ፡ በኀበ ፡ ዴገንዎሙ
                  ፡ ወቀተልዎሙ ፡ ለኵሎሙ ፡ በኀፂን ፡ ወአጥፍእዎሙ ፡ ወተመይጠ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ በጊዜሃ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ወቀተላ ፡ በኀፂን ።

translations.lxx: And when the children of Israel had ceased slaying all that were in Gai, and in the fields, and in the mountain on the descent, from whence they pursued them even to the end, then Joshua returned to Gai, and smote it with the edge of the sword.
translations.kjv: And it came to pass, when Israel had made an end of slaying all the inhabitants of Ai in the field, in the wilderness wherein they chased them, and when they were all fallen on the edge of the sword, until they were consumed, that all the Israelites returned unto Ai, and smote it with the edge of the sword.

verses.geez:
ወኮኑ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ እለ ፡ ሞቱ ፡ ይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ተባዕቱ ፡ ወአንስቱ ፡ እልፍ ፡ ወዕሥራ ፡ ምእት ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሰብአ ፡
                  ጋይ ።

translations.lxx: And they that fell in that day, men and women, were twelve thousand: they slew all the inhabitants of Gai.
translations.kjv: And so it was, that all that fell that day, both of men and women, were twelve thousand, even all the men of Ai.

verses.geez: ወኢሜጠ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ እዴሁ ፡ እንተ ፡ አልዐለ ፡ በጋይሶ ፡ እስከ ፡ አጥፍእዎሙ ፡ ለሰብአ ፡ ጋይ ።

translations.kjv: For Joshua drew not his hand back, wherewith he stretched out the spear, until he had utterly destroyed all the inhabitants of Ai.

verses.geez:
ዘእንበለ ፡ እንስሳ ፡ ወበርበረ ፡ ሀገር ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘበርበሩ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለርእሶሙ ፡ በትእዛዘ ፡ እግዚአብሔር
                  ፡ በከመ ፡ አዘዞ ፡ እግዚአብሔር ፡ ለኢየሱስ ።

translations.lxx: Beside the spoils that were in the city, all things which the children of Israel took as spoil for themselves according to the command of the Lord, as the Lord commanded Joshua.
translations.kjv: Only the cattle and the spoil of that city Israel took for a prey unto themselves, according unto the word of the LORD which he commanded Joshua.

verses.geez:
ወአውዐያ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ለሀገር ፡ በእሳት ፡ ወኮነት ፡ ሐመደ ፡ ወረሰያ ፡ ከመ ፡ አልቦ ፡ ዘይነብራ ፡ ለዘላፉ ፡ እስከ
                  ፡ ዮም ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And Joshua burnt the city with fire: he made it an uninhabited heap for ever, even to this day.
translations.kjv: And Joshua burnt Ai, and made it an heap for ever, even a desolation unto this day.

verses.geez:
ወለንጉሠ ፡ ጋይ ፡ ሰቀሎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዕፅ ፡ ዘግባ ፡ ወነበረ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ዕፅ ፡ እስከ ፡ ሰርክ ፡ ወሶበ ፡ ዐርበት ፡
                  ፀሐይ ፡ አዘዘ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ወአውረድዎ ፡ እምውስተ ፡ ዕፅ ፡ ወወገርዎ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ግብ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አንቀጸ ፡ ሀገር ፡
                  ወገብሩ ፡ ሎቱ ፡ ነፍቀ ፡ አንተ ፡ እብን ፡ ዐባይ ፡ እስከ ፡ ዮም ፡ ወእስከ ፡ ዛቲ ፡ ዕለት ።

translations.lxx: And he hanged the king of Gai on a gallows; and he remained on the tree till evening: and when the sun went down, Joshua gave charge, and they took down his body from the tree, and cast it into a pit, and they set over him a heap of stones until this day.
translations.kjv: And the king of Ai he hanged on a tree until eventide: and as soon as the sun was down, Joshua commanded that they should take his carcase down from the tree, and cast it at the entering of the gate of the city, and raise thereon a great heap of stones, that remaineth unto this day.

verses.geez:
ወሶበ ፡ ሰምዑ ፡ ኵሎሙ ፡ ነገሥተ ፡ አሞሬዎን ፡ እለ ፡ ሀለዉ ፡ ማዕዶተ ፡ ዮርዳንስ ፡ እለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አድባር ፡
                  ወእለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ገዳም ፡ ወእለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ሐይቀ ፡ ባሕር ፡ ዐቢይ ፡ ወእለ ፡ ውስተ ፡ አንጢሊባኖን ፡ ወኬጤዎን ፡
                  ወከናኔዎን ፡ ወፌሬዜዎን ፡ ወኤዌዎን ፡ ወአሞሬዎን ፡ ወጌርጌሴዎን ፡ ወኢያቡሴዎን ፤

translations.kjv: Then Joshua built an altar unto the LORD God of Israel in mount Ebal,

verses.geez: ተጋብኡ ፡ ኅቡረ ፡ ከመ ፡ ይፅብእዎሙ ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ወለኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.kjv: As Moses the servant of the LORD commanded the children of Israel, as it is written in the book of the law of Moses, an altar of whole stones, over which no man hath lift up any iron: and they offered thereon burnt offerings unto the LORD, and sacrificed peace offerings.

verses.geez: ወነደቀ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ምሥዋዐ ፡ ይእተ ፡ አሚረ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ አምላከ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በደብረ ፡ ጌባል ፤

translations.kjv: And he wrote there upon the stones a copy of the law of Moses, which he wrote in the presence of the children of Israel.

verses.geez:
በከመ ፡ አዘዞሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ቍልዔሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ለደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ በከመ ፡ ጽሑፍ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕገ ፡ ሙሴ ፡
                  ምሥዋዐ ፡ ዘእብን ፡ መብሐት ፡ ዘኢተወቅረ ፡ ወዘኢተገብረ ፡ በኅፂን ፡ ወአዕረገሂ ፡ ቍርባነ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወመሥዋዕተ ፡
                  መድኀኒት ።

translations.kjv: And all Israel, and their elders, and officers, and their judges, stood on this side the ark and on that side before the priests the Levites, which bare the ark of the covenant of the LORD, as well the stranger, as he that was born among them; half of them over against mount Gerizim, and half of them over against mount Ebal; as Moses the servant of the LORD had commanded before, that they should bless the people of Israel.

verses.geez:
ወጸሐፎ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ውስተ ፡ እብን ፡ ለዝክቱ ፡ ዳግም ፡ ኦሪት ፡ ሕገ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ዘጸሐፈ ፡ በቅድሜሆሙ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡
                  ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.kjv: And afterward he read all the words of the law, the blessings and cursings, according to all that is written in the book of the law.

verses.geez:
ወኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ወመኳንንቲሆሙ ፡ ወጸሐፍቶሙ ፡ የሐውሩ ፡ እምፀጋም ፡ ወእምየማን ፡ ቅድመ ፡ ታቦት ፡ ወካህናትሰ ፡
                  ወሌዋውያን ፡ ይጸውሩ ፡ ታቦተ ፡ ሕጉ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ወመንፈቆሙ ፡ ለግዩራን ፡ ወእለሂ ፡ እምፍጥረቶሙ ፡ ጠቃ ፡ ደብረ ፡
                  ጌባል ፡ ወመንፈቆሙ ፡ ጠቃ ፡ ደብረ ፡ ጋሪዝን ፡ እለ ፡ አዘዞሙ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ቍልዔሁ ፡ ለእግዚአብሔር ፡ ከመ ፡ ይባርክዎ ፡
                  ለሕዝበ ፡ እስራኤል ።

translations.kjv: There was not a word of all that Moses commanded, which Joshua read not before all the congregation of Israel, with the women, and the little ones, and the strangers that were conversant among them.

verses.geez:
ወእሙንቱ ፡ ይቀውሙ ፡ ወእምድኅረ ፡ ዝንቱ ፡ አንበበ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ነገሮ ፡ ለዝንቱ ፡ ሕግ ፡ በረከቶሂ ፡
                  ወመርገሞሂ ፡ ኵሎ ፡ ዘጽሑፍ ፡ ውስተ ፡ ሕገ ፡ ሙሴ ።

ወአልቦ ፡ ቃለ ፡ እምነ ፡ ኵሉ ፡ ዘአዘዞ ፡ ሙሴ ፡ ለኢየሱስ ፡ ዘኢያንበበ ፡ ወዘኢያስምዖሙ ፡ ኢየሱስ ፡ ለኵሉ ፡
                  ተዓይነ ፡ ደቂቀ ፡ እስራኤል ፡ ለዕደዊሆሙ ፡ ወለአንስቲያሆሙ ፡ ወለደቂቆሙ ፡ ወለግዩራን ፡ እለ ፡ ሖሩ ፡ ምስለ ፡ እስራኤል
                  ፡ (ወለኵሉ ፡ እስራኤል ፡)፡
